---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm frustrated when [...]

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Explain how the proposed feature fits into the Colony (Router-Suboperator-Verifier-Atma) architecture.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

**Additional Context**
Add any other context or diagrams about the feature request here (e.g. impact on RAM/latency benchmarks).
